ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Fabrication Methods
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build the United Front Fabricator workbench needed to produce United Front equipment.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Bulwark Armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft armor and helmets that provide stronger protection than flak gear and cover more of the body.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Bulwark Molecular Plating
ResearchProjectDef.description: Apply molecular-grade plating techniques to Bulwark armor, producing heavier configurations with substantially improved protection at increased material cost.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Bulwark Specialized Compositions
ResearchProjectDef.description: Refine Bulwark composite formulations for specialized officer-grade armor configurations that combine protection with the appearance expected of command personnel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Bulwark Recomposition Methods
ResearchProjectDef.description: Restructure Bulwark composite matrices into alternate configurations suited for specialist combat roles.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Varangian Power Armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct lighter-frame powered combat suits favored by mobile assault elements. Augments the wearer's strength, mobility, and survivability. Requires analysis of an armor decoder.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Praetorian Power Armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct heavy-frame powered combat suits for command personnel and elite guard units. Maximum protection with reduced mobility. Requires analysis of an armor decoder.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Woven Uniforms
ResearchProjectDef.description: Tailor garments that provide light protection and insulation for a variety of climates.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Extreme Weather Uniforms
ResearchProjectDef.description: Tailor heavily modified garments designed for survival and work in extreme heat and cold.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Commissar Uniforms
ResearchProjectDef.description: Tailor garments with commissar markings that offer the same protection as standard apparel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Standardized Infantry Kits
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft equipment that improves reload speed and general combat readiness.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Modified Specialist Kits
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft specialized equipment for heavy frontline use by shocktroopers and engineers.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Magnetic Coil Manufacturing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct basic coil weapons used by United Front settlers. Capacitor banks and rail coils require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: High-Frequency Generators
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct weapons that use ultrasonic vibration generators. Note that these also require advanced components.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Coil Fabrication
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct advanced coil weaponry fielded by United Front armed forces. Multi-stage rail acceleration and precision capacitor tuning enable significantly higher velocity and penetration.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Reinforced Coil Superstructures
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct heavy coil weapons favored by United Front pirates and mercenaries. Industrial-scale capacitor banks deliver devastating slug impacts.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ionized Gas Refinement
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct ultratech laser weapons that fire focused beams of coherent light through refined ionized gas. Requires analysis of a weapons decoder.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Magnetic Coil Turret
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct stationary coil turrets for base defense. Slow-firing but accurate, capable of penetrating standard armor at range.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Reinforced Magnetic Coil Turret
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct heavy coil turret emplacements with anti-armor capability. Designed to engage vehicles and mechanoid threats.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Heavy Ion-Plasma Weaponry
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct ultratech plasma weapons that channel ionized plasma streams capable of melting through armor and structure alike. Requires analysis of a weapons decoder.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ion-Plasma Turrets
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct ultratech plasma turret emplacements for sustained area denial. Capable of engaging multiple armored targets simultaneously.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ion-Plasma Blades
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct ultratech plasma-edged melee weapons that channel containment-stabilized plasma along a blade edge, slicing through armor and tissue with equal ease.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Matter-Recombination
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct food synthesizers that produce nutrient packs from raw biomass and chemicals via molecular recombination, eliminating the need for agriculture in hostile climates. Requires analysis of a utility decoder.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Bio-Augments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct vat-grown organic prosthetics that replace lost limbs and organs with genetically engineered biological replacements. Reinforced bone structure, denser musculature, and combat-grade tissue augmentations. Requires analysis of a medical decoder.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Bio-Augments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct perfected vat-grown organic augments that push biological engineering to its practical ceiling. Enhanced organ function, optimized sensory replacements, and combat-grade limb augmentations engineered for elite frontline personnel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Frontier Entertainment
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct recreation items including the euchre table and wargaming table for off-duty United Front personnel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Netcasting Entertainment
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct mid-tier recreation devices that broadcast curated content over local networks for off-duty personnel.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Holographic Entertainment
ResearchProjectDef.description: Construct ultratech holographic recreation devices including the game sphere. Requires analysis of a utility decoder.
